scope_note: PAC-Bayes Constant Cert: machine-tract lock for Phase-1 PAC-Bayes theory. Certifies K1=2*C^2*N*(M/2)^2 (corrected from erroneous 2*N*M^2 derivation), recomputes PAC bounds from raw (D_QA, m, delta, risk_hat) inputs using QA_DQA variant (log(1/delta) term), enforces improvement ratio 5585%->1813% (3.1x), and locks DPI scope to structured_only (51.8% random-trial violation rate disclosed).
